calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Pro Tem Nils Rosenquest, Clerk: V. Mack, CSR: JoAnn Bryce
David Wasserman, Esq. for Plaintiff P.H. Sonntag, Inc.
Defendant James Mineer, Jr. present in pro per.
Parties reached a settlement agreement and did not request the terms of the agreement be put on the record. A written stipulation to be filed per JPT Rosenquest.

The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
